messages.text:
BL-588 — Isolate batch recovery trees so one ticket's defect cannot block its clean siblings from landing
Approval context: Needs a human ruling on WHICH approach before any code, because all four
change pipeline topology or QA's authority over `main`, and one of them
(approach 4) is "do nothing", which no agent should choose unilaterally.

Please rule on:
- Which of the four approaches above, or a fifth.
- Whether QA m…
BL-588 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-588" (or "reject BL-588 <reason>") to act.
